package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryDependsOnServicePackage() string {
    ruleID := "repository_depends_on_service_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that import service packages, which inverts the expected dependency flow."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
